generated_oml:
instance ACME_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description language allowing modular system architecture expression."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingProcessService
]

instance AADL_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL (Architecture Analysis & Design Language) used for modeling system hardware and software interactions."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingProcessService
]

instance MontiArc_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL for component and connectors modeling with hierarchical architecture."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingProcessService
]

instance SysMLIBD_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Interaction-Block Diagrams (IBDs) for depicting system interactions."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingProcessService
]

instance Simulink_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink used for quantitative simulation of the modeled system."
    DTDFVocab:enables QuantitativeSimulationService
]

instance ArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture model expressed using multiple ADLs such as ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACME_Enabler, AADL_Enabler, MontiArc_Enabler, SysMLIBD_Enabler
]

instance QuantitativeSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Quantitative simulation model derived from the system architecture using MathWorks Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance ModelingProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that orchestrates model-driven engineering with MBSE tools, translating ADL specifications into system models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureModelInsight
]

instance QuantitativeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing simulation of the system model in Simulink and analyzing performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ArchitectureModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing integrated view of system architecture across multiple ADLs."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing quantitative simulation results of the system behavior."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle is structured around the MBSE approach, progressing through successive levels of abstraction: requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical architecture. Each phase is represented by distinct modeling artefacts (e.g., SysML requirement diagrams, functional block diagrams, logical connectors via MontiArc, and product-level models). Transition management is achieved through model transformation rules and conformance checks that ensure consistency between successive abstraction layers. Governance is performed under established MBSE methodologies such as RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, or SMArDT, which define lifecycle checkpoints, verification artefacts, and configuration management."
]
